panels.title: Clientes Possíveis (soma dos bottlenecks de cada site)

targets.query:
import "math"

per_site = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_per_site = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "atual_t1"})

join(tables: {a: per_site, b: t1_per_site}, on: ["site"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         cp: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then (r.max_supported * r.atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - r.atual_t1 else 0.0),
       }))
  |> group(columns: ["site"])
  |> min(column: "cp")
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "cp")
  |> rename(columns: {cp: "_value"})

import "math"

per_site = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

t1_per_site = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "atual_t1"})

join(tables: {a: per_site, b: t1_per_site}, on: ["site"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         clientes_possiveis: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then (r.max_supported * r.atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - r.atual_t1 else 0.0),
       }))
  |> group(columns: ["site"])
  |> min(column: "clientes_possiveis")
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["site","clientes_possiveis"])
  |> rename(columns: {clientes_possiveis: "_value", site: "_field"})

panels.title: Bottleneck por site (indicador que mais limita)
Indicador que está limitando cada site

targets.query:
import "math"

per_site = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type","display_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["site","display_name","current_usage","max_supported"])

t1_per_site = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "atual_t1"})

enriched = join(tables: {a: per_site, b: t1_per_site}, on: ["site"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         clientes_possiveis: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.max_supported * r.atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - r.atual_t1) else 0.0),
       }))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","display_name","clientes_possiveis","atual_t1"])

enriched
  |> group(columns: ["site"])
  |> min(column: "clientes_possiveis")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["clientes_possiveis"], desc: false)
  |> rename(columns: {display_name: "Indicador bottleneck", clientes_possiveis: "Clientes Possíveis", atual_t1: "Clientes atuais"})

panels.title: Capacity por site × indicador — fórmulas da planilha (Por cliente, Projeção, Número final, Max Clientes, Sobra, Clientes Possíveis)

targets.query:
import "math"

// Snapshot por site × usage_type: pivota current_usage e max_supported.
per_site = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_usage" or r._field == "max_supported")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type =~ /^(NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_SWITCHES|NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS|NUMBER_OF_NAT_RULES|NUMBER_OF_LOGICAL_PORTS|NUMBER_OF_GROUPS_BASED_ON_IP_SETS)$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["site","usage_type","display_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["site","usage_type","display_name","current_usage","max_supported"])

// Atual_T1 por site (denominador "Por cliente").
t1_per_site = from(bucket: "nsx_capacity")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "nsx_capacity" and r._field == "current_usage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.usage_type == "NUMBER_OF_TIER1_ROUTERS")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site =~ /^${site:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["site","_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "atual_t1"})

alvo_t1 = float(v: ${t1_target})

join(tables: {a: per_site, b: t1_per_site}, on: ["site"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         por_cliente:       (if r.atual_t1 > 0.0 then math.round(x: r.current_usage / r.atual_t1 * 100.0) / 100.0 else 0.0),
         projecao:          (if r.atual_t1 > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.current_usage / r.atual_t1) * (alvo_t1 - r.atual_t1)) else 0.0),
         numero_final:      (if r.atual_t1 > 0.0 then math.round(x: r.current_usage + (r.current_usage / r.atual_t1) * (alvo_t1 - r.atual_t1)) else r.current_usage),
         max_clientes:      (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: r.max_supported * r.atual_t1 / r.current_usage) else 0.0),
         clientes_possiveis: (if r.current_usage > 0.0 then math.round(x: (r.max_supported * r.atual_t1 / r.current_usage) - r.atual_t1) else 0.0),
       }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with
         sobra: (if r.max_supported - r.numero_final > 0.0 then r.max_supported - r.numero_final else 0.0),
       }))
  |> keep(columns: ["site","display_name","max_supported","current_usage","por_cliente","projecao","numero_final","max_clientes","sobra","atual_t1","clientes_possiveis"])
  |> rename(columns: {
         display_name:       "Indicador",
         max_supported:      "Limite",
         current_usage:      "Nº Atual",
         por_cliente:        "Por cliente",
         projecao:           "Projeção",
         numero_final:       "Número final",
         max_clientes:       "Max Clientes",
         sobra:              "Sobra",
         atual_t1:           "Clientes atuais",
         clientes_possiveis: "Clientes Possíveis",
       })
  |> sort(columns: ["site","Indicador"])
